qas.q: Passenger deviations are not authorized. Transport this material on dedicated airlift (special assignment airlift only)
Transport this material on cargo aircraft only. Pax deviations are not authorized
Transport this material on cargo aircraft only. Deviations are authorized according to paragraph 2.2 and attachment 22
Transport this material on cargo aircraft only. Deviations are authorized according to paragraph 2.2 attachment 22. DOD duty pax do not require deviation
Transport this material on passenger or cargo aircraft without restrictions
